description_long: This object is a military-style rifle with a black metal receiver and barrel, complemented by wooden furniture on the handguard and pistol grip. The rifle features a distinctive curved detachable magazine, likely for intermediate cartridges, and a skeletonized folding stock at the rear for compactness and portability. The front end of the barrel is equipped with a slotted flash hider, and the rifle is fitted with standard iron sights, including a front post and a rear notch. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, with visible mechanical components such as the trigger, magazine release, and charging handle. The combination of wood and metal gives it a classic, rugged appearance suitable for urban or tactical scenarios.
description: A black and wood military-style rifle with a curved magazine, folding skeleton stock, and iron sights. The design is robust, featuring a flash hider and a mix of metal and wood components.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the wooden handguard, pistol grip, curved magazine, and skeletonized folding stock.
description_view_1: Narrow end-on view highlighting the slim profile of the barrel and the alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the magazine, trigger, and folding stock, with clear visibility of the receiver and handguard.
description_view_3: Barrel-end view emphasizing the muzzle device and the alignment of the front sight post.
